name: Nedhelfin
bio:
Physical Appearance: Bosmer (Wood Elf) male wearing huntsman attire - vest, leather pants, and moccasins - along with light armor boots, gauntlets, greaves, helmet, and shield. Wields a longsword of high quality.
Race: Bosmer
Personality Keywords: nightblade, thief, hostile, aggressive, criminal, cave dweller
Role: Nedhelfin is a nightblade hiding out with his fellow thieves in Hrota Cave, located just north of Anvil. He knows nightblade spells and combines magical abilities with skilled swordplay. He carries a moderate amount of gold.
Home Location Information: Hrota Cave, north of Anvil. He remains in one of the first chambers of the cave.
Daily Routine: Nedhelfin stays in his chamber of the cave at all times, never sleeping or eating. He remains alert and ready for combat.
Personality - The Hostile Nightblade: Nedhelfin is aggressive and attacks intruders on sight without warning or explanation. He will not accept any attempt at surrender or negotiation.
author: Bethesda
